violations.description: FOOD SOURCE (4 pts): Home prepared food noted being used in the establishment. Observed frozen chocolate covered bananas being produced in the facility without a food service license or proper food prep areas.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler and in main grocery area. Observed whole peanuts stored in a burlap bag on the floor in main grocery area and a case of lettuce in the walk in cooler.
